1782.reason: [The error line number for missing semicolon in STMT_EXP should correspond to the line of the last non-terminal before the semicolon, but np-1 may not be correct when np==0 or when tokens have been skipped; also, this condition only handles STMT_EXP form but the grammar allows [Exp] ';' which includes empty expression cases]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The error line number for missing semicolon in STMT_EXP should correspond to the line of the last non-terminal before the semicolon, but np-1 may not be correct when np==0 or when tokens have been skipped; also, this condition only handles STMT_EXP form but the grammar allows [Exp] ';' which includes empty expression cases]
